title: Spec Tab Overview
description: Studio UI for **Spec Tab Overview**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Spec Tab Overview**.
context: Studio UI for **Spec Tab Overview**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Spec Tab Overview**.

rules.requirement: spec tab polls metadata while visible
rules:
While the Overview tab is visible, the view MUST refresh spec detail via `getSpec` on tab-scoped poll ticks. New specs in the tree are already discovered by the global workspace poll.

The Overview presentation MUST also serve as the primary place for spec metadata summary; Studio MUST NOT require a separate **Metadata** tab to read the current spec's identity and description. Metadata MUST be presented using shadcn **`Card`** components and **`Badge`** status indicators.

rules.requirement: linked changes tab lists active changes referencing the current spec
rules:
When the user selects the **Linked Changes** center tab, Studio MUST read the embedded `linkedChanges[]` summaries from the current `getSpec()` detail response and list the active changes whose `specIds` include the open spec's `specId`.

Each row SHOULD show:

- change name
- description when present
- lifecycle state with its corresponding state color

The list MUST NOT show unrelated active changes, drafts, or archived items. If no active change references the current spec, the UI MUST show an explicit empty state instead of throwing.
Components MUST consume data through `SpecdDataPort` hooks and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

rules.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
rules: While requests are in flight or fail, the UI MUST show loading indicators and human-readable errors (including HTTP 409 on save conflicts where applicable).

scenarios.requirement: spec tab polls metadata while visible
scenarios.name: Visible spec tab refreshes metadata
given: spec tab for core:kernel is active
then: spec metadata hook refetches
AND tree discovery still uses global poll

scenarios.requirement: spec tab polls metadata while visible
scenarios.name: Overview replaces a dedicated metadata tab
then: the user can read the current spec summary there
AND no separate Metadata tab is required

scenarios.requirement: spec tab polls metadata while visible
scenarios.name: Hidden spec tab stops metadata poll
given: user switches away from spec tab
then: no metadata request is sent
AND last data remains rendered

scenarios.requirement: spec tab polls metadata while visible
scenarios.name: New spec appears via workspace tree poll
given: agent adds a spec file on disk
then: tree shows new node
AND spec tab poll does not scan filesystem directly

scenarios.requirement: linked changes tab lists active changes referencing the current spec
scenarios.name: Linked Changes filters active changes by specId
given: AND active changes include one that contains core:kernel and another that does not
then: UI lists only the change that references core:kernel
AND the data comes from the current spec detail payload
AND unrelated active changes are excluded

scenarios.requirement: linked changes tab lists active changes referencing the current spec
scenarios.name: Linked Changes hidden tab pauses overlap poll
then: linked-change list does not refetch until tab visible again

scenarios.requirement: linked changes tab lists active changes referencing the current spec
scenarios.name: Linked Changes shows description and colored state
given: a referenced active change has a description and lifecycle state
then: the row shows the description text
AND the state badge uses the state color

scenarios.requirement: linked changes tab lists active changes referencing the current spec
scenarios.name: No referencing active changes shows empty state
given: no active change contains the current spec's specId
then: the UI renders an explicit empty state

scenarios.name: Component consumes SpecdDataPort hooks only
when: UI package dependency graph is inspected
then: @specd/ui does not import @specd/core
AND components call client:port-* hooks

scenarios.name: Hook delegates to configured adapter
when: component mounts and requests change data
then: calls go through SpecdDataPort
AND no direct repository or kernel import

scenarios.name: Adding a core import fails the boundary
then: lint or build fails
AND data must flow through the port surface

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Hook exposes loading while port call is in flight
when: port method is invoked from the component
then: consumers observe loading state until the promise settles

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Failed fetch shows human-readable error
given: port returns a network or HTTP error
then: consumers receive an error object
AND UI renders the message instead of stale data

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Save conflict shows HTTP 409 to the user
when: inspector save hook completes with error
then: UI shows the conflict message
AND editor buffer is not silently replaced
